full_text:
Sima Ti 司馬悌
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sima Ti (司馬悌). Son of Sima Jin, he was enfeoffed as a King when Sima Yan became Emperor. Sima Ti was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty.
